Job Title: Technical Product Lead GCL E Introduction To Role Are you ready to turn complex supply chain data into intelligent products that accelerate medicines to patients? Do you thrive at the intersection of product leadership, sophisticated analytics and real-world impact? As a Technical Product Lead, you will drive the strategy and delivery of data and AI products that power planning, sourcing and delivery across our global operations. You will partner with experts across manufacturing, supply chain, and technology to shape a product portfolio that boosts reliability, speed and agility, while introducing GenAI capabilities that elevate decision-making and productivity. This is a hands-on leadership role that blends product thinking with technical depth. You will translate bold goals into clear roadmaps, orchestrate cross-functional delivery, and scale solutions with robust engineering practices. Your work will help the business perform at its peak—shortening cycles, improving service levels, and ultimately getting life-changing medicines to patients faster. Accountabilities Product Strategy and Alignment: Lead the development of technical products aligned with business goals, focusing on high-value supply chain outcomes and measurable impact. Coordinate the discovery, build, and operation of advanced analytics and machine learning solutions. This includes work from PoC to secure, observable, and reliable production. Ensure value is realized at scale. le. Roadmap Decomposition: Break down feature epics into technical tasks, manage dependencies across teams, and remove blockers to maintain delivery momentum. Quality, Scale, and Sustainability: Ensure high-quality, scalable, and sustainable product delivery through strong engineering standards, data governance, and performance management. Stake-holder Partnership: Collaborate with technology and business teams to design and deliver innovative solutions, bringing together product, data science, engineering, and operations. Research and Innovation: Conduct research to drive continuous improvement and innovation, including evaluating and piloting GenAI tools where they can amplify productivity and insights. Resource Optimization: Optimize resource allocation through data-driven prioritization, balancing short-term wins with long-term platform health. Product Excellence and Standards: Maintain high standards for in-house products and tools, codifying standard processes and reusability across teams. Near-term Delivery: Lead the build of AI-powered supply chain use cases such as forecasting, planning, quality, and logistics, demonstrating clear business outcomes. Long-term Scaling and Governance: Establish the frameworks, patterns, and operating model to continuously deliver, scale, and sustain a growing product portfolio. Essential Skills/Experience Exposure of Pharma Supply Chain Domain Experience of delivering Digital products using Data, Analytics, AI technologies. Expertise in Data Analytics, AI technologies. Experience leading complex data, AI projects. Proficiency in the full software development lifecycle. Strong communication and stake-holder leadership skills. Experience working in Agile teams. Bachelor's - degree in IT, Computer Science, Data Analytics, or related field. Desirable Skills/Experience Master's - Degree, M.B.A, or Ph.d in a relevant field Product/Project Management experience in Data, Analytics & AI solutions Previous involvement in a large multinational company, Pharmaceutical or similar environment Awareness of use case specific GenAI tools available in the market and their application in day-to-day work scenarios. Possess working knowledge of basic prompting techniques and continuously improve these skills. Stay up-to-date with developments in AI and GenAI, applying new insights to work-related situations Why AstraZeneca Join a global technology and data community that partners across boundaries to unlock the potential of science through digital products. Here, diverse minds gather—engineers, data scientists, product leaders, and supply chain experts in the same room—sparking bold ideas and turning them into reality. We are doubling down on our data-led ambition, investing in modern platforms and empowering teams to experiment, learn fast and scale what works. You will find the freedom to own outcomes, the backing to tackle complex challenges, and a culture that values courtesy alongside ambition. Your work will have a direct line of sight to patients, improving how medicines are made and delivered worldwide. Call To Action Seize this opportunity to lead data and AI products that transform supply chains and accelerate patient impact—bring your expertise to AstraZeneca and help shape what’s next today! Date Posted 20-May-2026 Closing Date 28-May-2026 AstraZeneca embraces diversity and equality of opportunity. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse team representing all backgrounds, with as wide a range of perspectives as possible, and harnessing industry-leading skills. We believe that the more inclusive we are, the better our work will be. We welcome and consider applications to join our team from all qualified candidates, regardless of their characteristics. We comply with all applicable laws and regulations on non-discrimination in employment (and recruitment), as well as work authorization and employment eligibility verification requirements.
